name: 6 Outlet Wall Tap White - Dealworthy™
description:
The 6 Outlet Wall Tap White - Dealworthy™ is ideal for saving space and keeping your cords organized and tangle free in your home or office. This allows a maximum amperage of 15 amps. The white finish is perfect for matching any decor and the 6 outlets provide plenty of space for plugging in all your devices. This wall tap from Dealworthy™ is perfect for adding extra outlets to any room in your home.

dealworthy™: Just what you need, priced just right.
